limitations: Operator chat timing inside this slice is approximate unless anchored to repo receipts.
The 0.6.20 package report proves build inventory only; it records distributed:false and does not establish live prerelease authority.

entries.speaker: operator
entries.message: The operator reported that raw hosted presets were not showing reliably unless their filenames began with uppercase Preset, the internal asset names were too long to inspect in VaM, and a possible remaining playlist regression still made image navigation or image-directory behavior feel untrustworthy.

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: A bounded repo audit confirmed that raw preset discovery needed uppercase Preset naming, the long hosted-player asset path came from the 2018 exporter temp prefab path, there was no extra persisted selected-asset field beyond assetName and assetUrl, and all-image directory loads still needed a shared paused-by-default rule.

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: Built 0.6.20 cleanly with the shorter base-player asset path and the shared image-directory paused-by-default logic.

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: Regenerated the 0.6.20 package inventory with -SkipVarDistribute and confirmed the report still shows distributed:false, so the package exists only as build inventory and not as a live prerelease authority.

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: Redeployed the raw modern_tv hosted-player proof as the canonical 0.6.20 alpha dev_deploy seam, with the new uppercase Preset filename and the shorter host asset name assets/fa/ps18/modern_tv/main.prefab.

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: Refreshed the baseline direct-player raw asset to the same 0.6.20 alpha core, verified the shorter internal asset name assets/fa/player/main.prefab, and removed the generic same-version live files so one raw authority remained for this version.

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: Post-slice hydration found that this lane mixed raw dev_deploy authority, build-only package inventory, and naming cleanup while basics like image next/previous playlist truth were still open. It also found that the hosted proof receipt named a deployed 0.6.20 preset path that was not present on disk, so filesystem truth must win over the receipt for this slice.

decisions: 0.6.20 is its own semantic version because preset discovery, internal asset naming, shared image-directory load behavior, and focus-loss snapshot behavior changed after 0.6.19 had already been built for testing.
The current live authority seam for this slice remains raw dev_deploy Custom artifacts, not the .var package.
Raw hosted-player presets in this lane must begin with uppercase Preset_ so VaM discovery remains truthful.
All-image selections, including directories that resolve entirely to images, should pause by default unless an explicit play flag says otherwise.
openQuestions: Does 0.6.20 stop the remaining image-directory autoplay and next-or-previous confusion in live VaM testing?
Does 0.6.20 materially improve the app-switch restart seam for the problematic movie tests?
What is the correct mixed-media playlist policy when the same playlist intentionally contains both images and videos?
notes: The 0.6.20 package report exists because the hosted proof wrapper expects package inventory, and the final report records distributed:false so the live authority did not drift away from raw dev_deploy.
The current branch name still reflects the older 0.6.14 stability train; branch-process correction still needs to happen separately from this runtime slice.
Hydration lesson: keep branch label, semantic version, live authority seam, and build-only inventory separate. Do not let receipt claims outrank missing files on disk.
